title: Solving (some) formal math olympiad problems
summary: A neural theorem prover for Lean trained to solve formal mathematics, including high-school olympiad problems from AMC12 and AIME and two problems adapted from the IMO, advancing automated formal reasoning.

title: Solving math word problems
summary: Trains verifiers that rank candidate solutions to grade-school math word problems (the GSM8K dataset), roughly doubling accuracy over a fine-tuned GPT-3 baseline and approaching the performance of 9-12-year-old children.

title: TruthfulQA: Measuring how models mimic human falsehoods

title: Jukebox
summary: Announces Jukebox, a neural net generating music, including rudimentary singing, as raw audio in a variety of genres and artist styles, with released model weights, code, and a tool to explore generated samples.
